# PetZenAI
> Free AI-powered pet care tools and expert guides for dogs, cats, and other pets. Science-backed, vet-reviewed content helping pet owners make informed decisions.

## Free Pet Care Tools
- [Pet Food Portion Calculator](https://petzenai.com/tools/pet-food-portion-calculator/): Calculate daily food portions for dogs, cats, rabbits, birds based on weight, age and activity level
- [Pet Age Calculator](https://petzenai.com/tools/pet-age-calculator/): Convert your pet's age to human years using breed-specific, DNA-based scientific formulas
- [Pet Vaccination Schedule](https://petzenai.com/tools/pet-vaccination-schedule/): Get a complete vet-recommended immunization schedule tailored to your pet's age and type
- [AI Pet Name Generator](https://petzenai.com/tools/ai-pet-name-generator/): Generate unique pet names filtered by species, gender, personality and meaning
- [Pet Exercise Calculator](https://petzenai.com/tools/pet-exercise-calculator/): Calculate daily exercise needs based on breed energy level, age, weight and health
- [What Pet Should I Get?](https://petzenai.com/tools/what-pet-should-i-get/): 10-question lifestyle quiz to find your perfect pet match

## Blog — Expert Pet Care Guides
- [Blog Home](https://petzenai.com/blog/): 30+ expert-written pet care articles updated regularly
- [How Much to Feed a Dog](https://petzenai.com/blog/how-much-to-feed-dog/): Complete dog feeding guide by weight and age
- [Dog Vaccination Schedule](https://petzenai.com/blog/dog-vaccination-schedule-guide/): Complete puppy and adult dog vaccine guide
- [Cat Nutrition Guide](https://petzenai.com/blog/cat-nutrition-guide/): What to feed your cat for a long, healthy life
- [Senior Dog Care](https://petzenai.com/blog/senior-dog-care-guide/): Complete care guide for dogs 7+ years

## Tool Categories (300+ Guides)
- [Dog Grooming Tools](https://petzenai.com/tools/dog-grooming/): 20 guides on bathing, trimming, brushing
- [Dog Health Tools](https://petzenai.com/tools/dog-health/): 25 health checkers and calculators
- [Cat Health Tools](https://petzenai.com/tools/cat-health/): Nutrition, grooming and health guides
- [Small Pet Care](https://petzenai.com/tools/small-pets/): Hamster, rabbit, guinea pig guides

## About
- [About PetZenAI](https://petzenai.com/about/): Our mission — science-backed pet care for every owner
- [Contact](https://petzenai.com/contact/): Get help and support
- [Privacy Policy](https://petzenai.com/privacy-policy/): How we handle your data
